name: run-and-verify-app
description: Launch real app surfaces, verify runtime behavior, and generate project-specific run skills.

interface.shortDescription: Run apps and verify live behavior
interface.longDescription: Launch and drive applications through their real runtime surface, verify code changes with runtime evidence instead of tests alone, and generate reusable project run skills.
defaultPrompt: Use $run-and-verify-app:run to launch this app and capture runtime evidence.
Use $run-and-verify-app:verify to confirm this change works in the running app.
Use $run-and-verify-app:run-skill-generator to record how to build, launch, and drive this project.
